mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_case_initial_run (application_case_id, state, job_analysis_provider, company_analysis_provider) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, 'PENDING', #{jobAnalysisProvider}, #{companyAnalysisProvider})
mapper.update: UPDATE application_case_initial_run SET state = 'RUNNING', execution_token = #{executionToken}, started_at = NOW() WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} AND state = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM application_case_initial_run WHERE state = 'RUNNING' AND started_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY started_at ASC, application_case_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
